CommunityApplications.Profile: OpenHands for Unraid – community Docker template for the open-source AI software-development agent. Plug-and-play with sensible defaults: pre-configured for local Ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b), Docker-socket sandboxing, and host.docker.internal routing. Switch to any OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenRouter / Mistral model from the template form. Maintained by junkerderprovinz. Support via GitHub issues.
